category_sources: source_facts.description says lightweight replacement for GNU autotools; official GitHub README describes mk-configure as a build system on top of bmake.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name both use mk-configure.
docs_sources: Official repository README explains mk-configure and links to doc/INSTALL.md; official repository has a doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; official GitHub README contains project documentation.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe bmake-based build system features and autoconf-like checks.
